evals.prompt: Create a ticket: the login page returns a 500 error when the user enters an email with a + character
evals.expected_behavior: Should generate a bug ticket with steps to reproduce, identify auth-related files in the codebase, and include acceptance criteria for handling special characters in emails

evals.prompt: Write a Linear ticket for adding dark mode support to the settings page
evals.expected_behavior: Should generate a feature request ticket with clear acceptance criteria, identify relevant UI components and theme-related files, and define out-of-scope items

evals.prompt: Draft a ticket: improve the API response time for the /users endpoint, it's taking over 3 seconds
evals.expected_behavior: Should generate an improvement ticket, explore the users endpoint code, identify potential bottlenecks in technical notes, and set measurable acceptance criteria for response time

evals.prompt: Create a ticket for updating the onboarding flow to include a company name field
evals.expected_behavior: Should generate a feature request, identify onboarding-related components and database models, include acceptance criteria for validation and edge cases, and mark unknowns with [CONFIRM]
